title: ESMA published its report on the EU DLT Pilot Regime, recommending significant changes to expand participation in onchain securities markets.
message_html: ESMA published its report on the EU DLT Pilot Regime, recommending significant changes to expand participation in onchain securities markets. ...
snippet: Dusk (@DuskFoundation): ESMA published its report on the EU DLT Pilot Regime, recommending significant changes to expand participation in onchain securities markets. The key recommendations: - Make the regime permanent. Remove the six-year license expiry. - Raise the current thresholds to make parti
